title: Scale CloudNativePG to 3-replica HA with backups and PgBouncer
subtasks: Update the CloudNativePG Cluster CR in the Helm chart to set spec.instances: 3 for production (parameterized via values-prod.yaml).
Set spec.minSyncReplicas: 1 and spec.maxSyncReplicas: 1 for synchronous replication.
Add a PodDisruptionBudget for the PostgreSQL StatefulSet with maxUnavailable: 1.
Configure automated daily backups: add spec.backup.barmanObjectStore (S3-compatible endpoint, bucket, credentials secret) or PVC-based WAL archiving as appropriate.
Add a ScheduledBackup CR for daily backups at 2 AM.
Enable PgBouncer connection pooling: deploy PgBouncer as a sidecar or separate Deployment, configure pool settings, and update DATABASE_URL in the ConfigMap to point to PgBouncer.
Ensure WAL archiving is enabled and retention policy is set (e.g., 30 days).
Update values-prod.yaml with all new settings; ensure values-dev.yaml remains single-replica, no backups, no PgBouncer.

title: Scale Redis to 3-node Sentinel cluster with maxmemory policy
subtasks: Update Redis Helm subchart values for production: architecture: replication, sentinel.enabled: true, replica.replicaCount: 2 (1 master + 2 replicas), sentinel.quorum: 2.
Set master.persistence.size and replica.persistence.size to at least 1Gi.
Configure Redis maxmemory policy (e.g., allkeys-lru) and set a reasonable memory limit.
Add a PodDisruptionBudget for Redis pods with maxUnavailable: 1.
Update REDIS_URL in the ConfigMap to use a sentinel-aware connection string (redis+sentinel:// or equivalent).
Document or template the required changes for the Rust app to support Redis Sentinel.
Ensure values-dev.yaml remains standalone, no sentinel.

title: Configure Ingress with TLS via cert-manager and CDN for static assets
subtasks: Create an Ingress resource for notifycore.{domain} with spec.tls using a cert-manager ClusterIssuer (Let's Encrypt or internal CA).
Add nginx ingress annotations for rate limiting (nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/limit-rps: "100").
Parameterize domain and ingressClassName in values-prod.yaml.
Ensure the TLS secret name matches cert-manager output.
If static assets are served, configure Cloudflare CDN for the domain and document DNS/CNAME setup.
Ensure values-dev.yaml does not render an Ingress resource.

title: Implement strict NetworkPolicies for namespace isolation
subtasks: Create a default-deny NetworkPolicy for all ingress and egress in the notifycore namespace.
Allow egress from notifycore app pods to PostgreSQL pods on port 5432.
Allow egress from notifycore app pods to Redis pods on port 6379.
Allow ingress from the ingress controller namespace to notifycore app pods on port 8080.
Allow egress to kube-dns on port 53 (UDP/TCP) for DNS resolution.
Parameterize ingress controller namespace in values-prod.yaml.
Ensure values-dev.yaml does not render any NetworkPolicy resources.

title: Add HPA, ServiceAccount, and ResourceQuota for production scaling and security
subtasks: Create a HorizontalPodAutoscaler for the notifycore Deployment: minReplicas: 2, maxReplicas: 10, target CPU utilization: 70%.
Create a ServiceAccount named notifycore-sa with automountServiceAccountToken: false.
Update the Deployment to use serviceAccountName: notifycore-sa.
Create a ResourceQuota in the notifycore namespace: requests.cpu: 2, requests.memory: 1Gi, limits.cpu: 4, limits.memory: 2Gi.
Add a PodDisruptionBudget for the notifycore app Deployment with maxUnavailable: 1.
Ensure all resources are conditionally rendered via values-prod.yaml; values-dev.yaml disables HPA and ResourceQuota.

title: Annotate secrets for rotation and document secret rotation procedure
subtasks: Add annotations to PostgreSQL and Redis secrets for external-secrets-operator or sealed-secrets compatibility (based on secretManagement.provider in values).
Add labels and annotations for rotation period and last-rotated date.
Create docs/secret-rotation.md with procedures for rotating PostgreSQL and Redis credentials, verification steps, and rollback instructions.
Ensure secret templates render correct annotations based on values-prod.yaml.

title: Consolidate all production settings in values-prod.yaml
subtasks: Create or update infra/notifycore/values-prod.yaml with all production settings: 3-replica PostgreSQL, Redis Sentinel, Ingress with TLS, NetworkPolicies, HPA, ResourceQuota, ServiceAccount, PDBs, and secret management provider.
Verify that values-dev.yaml remains unchanged and renders only single-replica, no HA, no ingress, no network policies, no HPA, no quota.
Run helm template with both values files and verify correct resource rendering.
Run kubectl apply --dry-run=server for both value sets to validate manifests.

title: Define CI/CD pipeline with lint, test, build, and deploy stages
subtasks: Create .github/workflows/ci.yaml for PR checks: cargo fmt --check, cargo clippy -- -D warnings, cargo sqlx prepare --check, cargo test.
Create .github/workflows/cd.yaml for deployment: Docker build and push on merge to main, Helm upgrade to staging, manual approval for production Helm upgrade.
Parameterize container registry credentials via GitHub secrets.
Ensure sqlx prepare check is present in the test job.
Add caching for Cargo registry and target directory.
Set appropriate timeouts for build and deploy jobs.
Validate pipeline YAML with actionlint or similar tool.
